company_summary: Docusign is the global leader in electronic signature and agreement management, offering products including eSignature, CLM, Rooms, and digital identity tools. The company is expanding beyond e-signature into a broader 'Intelligent Agreement Management' platform powered by AI (Insight, Analyzer). Their trajectory points toward workflow automation, AI-driven contract intelligence, and deep enterprise integrations.

contact_targets.title: Product Manager, AI/Intelligent Agreement Management
contact_targets.reason: Directly manages or works alongside the target role; best positioned to evaluate Sudheer's AI product and enterprise background

contact_targets.title: Engineering Manager, Platform or Integrations
contact_targets.reason: Sudheer's enterprise Java and microservices background aligns with Docusign's integration-heavy platform engineering; peer-level connection point
